case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE ABRAHAM GARCIA PEREZ

STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ANNE WONG. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEFINA FLORES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
